name: Lemon-Pepper Tuna
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle both sides of tuna with salt and pepper.
2. Heat oil in a nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add tuna; cook until browned on both sides and just slightly pink in the center, about 8 minutes.
3. Transfer tuna to a platter.
4. To the same skillet, add chicken broth and lemon juice. Bring to boiling. Remove from heat. Swirl in mustard and chives.
5. Spoon sauce over tuna. Serve immediately.
